mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_vendor WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical_vendor WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_vendor WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_vendor WHERE deleted = 0
AND (vendor_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR contact_person LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND grade = #{grade}
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chemical_vendor ( vendor_code, vendor_name, representative, contact_person, phone, supply_items_count, msds_status, last_transaction_date, grade, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{vendorCode}, #{vendorName}, #{representative}, #{contactPerson}, #{phone}, #{supplyItemsCount}, #{msdsStatus}, #{lastTransactionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{grade}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_chemical_vendor SET vendor_code = #{vendorCode}, vendor_name = #{vendorName}, representative = #{representative}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, phone = #{phone}, supply_items_count = #{supplyItemsCount}, msds_status = #{msdsStatus}, last_transaction_date = #{lastTransactionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, grade = #{grade}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_chemical_vendor SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
